overall.description: First-person exploration through a gritty industrial back room in a video game, moving from a cluttered storage area with graffiti-covered walls toward a rain-soaked exit illuminated by red emergency lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered storage room with kitchenette and graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a cramped back room past kitchen counters and storage shelves

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in blue and red spray paint tags
white cabinet with sink and metal fixtures
small table covered with blue cloth holding red noodle packages and boxes
tall industrial metal racks with stored items
stacked wooden pallets leaning against the back wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit industrial back room with graffiti-covered walls and cluttered storage. The camera moves forward past a kitchen counter on the left and a table with red noodle packages in the center, surrounded by metal shelving units.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor leading to rain-soaked loading bay

events.description: red emergency lighting becomes visible through the distant doorway ahead
rain becomes visible falling through the opening at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down a metal-grated corridor toward an exit with heavy rain and red emergency lighting visible ahead

entered.detail: metal grate flooring covering the corridor ground
wooden table with stacked cardboard boxes and blue cloth
heavy rainfall visible through the open doorway ahead
bright red emergency lighting illuminating the exit area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the storage room into a narrow corridor with metal grate flooring. Red emergency lighting becomes visible through a distant doorway, and as the camera approaches, heavy rain is seen falling through the opening. The graffiti wall and wooden pallets slide to the left as the camera advances toward the rain-soaked exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered, dimly lit industrial storage room toward a rain-soaked exit bathed in red light. It begins by gliding past graffiti-covered walls and a kitchen counter, moving through a space filled with metal shelving and a table topped with red noodle packages. As the camera advances, the storage area gives way to a narrow corridor featuring metal grate flooring. The scene then shifts as graffiti walls and wooden pallets slide out of view, drawing the camera closer to a distant doorway where red emergency lighting pierces the gloom. Finally, the movement culminates at the threshold, revealing heavy rain falling through the open exit.
